_meta.description: NSE stock universe for screener. Update periodically from NSE website.
_meta.how_to_update: Download ind_nifty500list.csv from nseindia.com, run: python3 -c "import csv,json; r=csv.DictReader(open('ind_nifty500list.csv')); d=[{'symbol':x['Symbol'].strip(),'name':x['Company Name'].strip(),'sector':x['Industry'].strip(),'industry':x['Industry'].strip()} for x in r if x['Symbol'].strip()]; json.dump({'_meta':{},'stocks':d},open('nse_universe.json','w'),indent=1)"
